name: GOSTARESH-E-ERTEBATAT-E MABNA COMPANY
notes: MabnaTelecom, incorporated in 2005, is a Fixed communication provider (fixed service provide) company. As the largest provider of dedicated bandwidth across the whole nation, MabnaTelecom has always been significantly successful in ICT sector and known to offer the most diversifies internet based services. The company is the primary nationwide “Internet Service Distribution Provider” covering the whole 31 provinces.
